title: millotia greevesii subsp. helmsii
intro: Millotia greevesii subsp. helmsii, also known as Helms' Millotia, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Millotia greevesii subsp. helmsii are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for treating various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
